case_title: MITCHELL COLLINS VS. MERIL WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLINS, MITCHELL AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MERIL DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MERIL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS, MITCHELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MERIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1619 REVERE AVENUE, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MERIL
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
